The user gave us a data formatting task. They want a plain text record with three key=value lines: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. The user gives the values: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-090575E5, blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers. They ask to "Return the three-line status record." So output exactly those three lines, each line starting with the key and "=" and then the given value.

Thus:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-090575E5
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers

Make sure no extra headings, no JSON, no markdown. Plain text. Also no trailing spaces. Provide exactly those three lines. That's it.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-090575E5
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers
